headline: Nearing 52-Week High, This is Where DTE Energy Will End The Year
summary: DTE Energy (NYSE:DTE) is approaching its 52-week high after a strong first half of 2026, and the hyperscaler tailwind keeps building. With shares at $147.19 and a 52-week high of $153.72, our 24/7 Wall St. price target points to $155.41 by year-end 2026, implying roughly 10.76% upside on a 12-month view. The recommendation is buy ... Nearing 52-Week High, This is Where DTE Energy Will End The Year

headline: General Motors (GM) Shares Key Software Update to Enable Power Transmition
summary: General Motors Co. (NYSE:GM) is one of the 10 best electric and autonomous driving stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On June 9, General Motors Co. (NYSE:GM) announced a software update enabling certain U.S. electric vehicle owners to transmit power back to the electric grid. This expands the existing vehicle-to-home system, which already allows […]
